name: set_annotated_delay
full_help:
set_annotated_delay

Description: 
set annotated delay

Syntax: 
set_annotated_delay  [-from <args>] [-to <args>] [-cell] [-net] [-min] [-max]
                     [-of_objects <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <delay>

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-from]        From pins or top level ports
  [-to]          To pins or top level ports
  [-cell]        Specifies that the annotated delay is for a cell
  [-net]         Specifies that the annotated delay is for a net
  [-min]         Specifies that the annotated delay is the minimum delay
  [-max]         Specifies that the annotated delay is the maximum delay
  [-of_objects]  List of timing arcs
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  <delay>        Annotated delay value

Categories: 
Timing
